description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, utilitarian design. It features a cylindrical barrel with a prominent muzzle and a ribbed fore-end grip, likely for improved handling. The receiver and stock area are compact, with a pistol grip for enhanced control, and the magazine appears to be detachable and slightly curved, suggesting a higher capacity. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The overall construction is metallic, with some polymer components visible on the grip and fore-end. Subtle wear and scuff marks on the surface indicate it is designed for practical use in demanding urban environments.
description: A matte black tactical shotgun with a ribbed fore-end, pistol grip, and detachable curved magazine, built for rugged urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and the alignment of the barrel, with the fore-end grip and magazine visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, ribbed fore-end, pistol grip, and the curved detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, pistol grip, and the magazine extending downward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with additional detail on the receiver and grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
